The '''Gauntlet starfighter''' was manufactured by [[Shobquix Yards]].

==Characteristics==
Measuring fourteen [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, it required a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]]/co-pilot. It carried [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]] for one or two days and 85 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] of cargo. The craft could achieve 850 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]], and it did not have a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. For combat it boasted two forward fire-linked [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], two turreted fire-linked laser cannons, one [[Proton torpedo launcher/Legends|proton torpedo launcher]], and modest shields.

==History==
It was widely used by criminals, including the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]] and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. [[Rebel privateer]]s made use of them as well.
